title: erigeron utahensis
intro: Erigeron utahensis, also known as Utah fleabane, is a perennial plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae) native to the southwestern United States. The plant's medicinal properties lie in its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate respiratory issues due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Erigeron utahensis include treating coughs, colds, and sore throats, as well as soothing digestive issues. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, allowing for various methods of consumption and application.
